query:
UPDATE products p 
JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
SET p.availableAtPalladium = FALSE 
WHERE c.slug IN ('food', 'asian-rice-noodle-bread');
command:
